info.title: BigBike Backend API
info.description: REST API for BigBike — Vietnam's premium motorcycle marketplace. Rewrite of WordPress backend. All endpoints return ApiDataResponse<T> or ApiListResponse<T> envelopes.

tags.name: Public Catalog
tags.description: Public product, category, brand reads — no auth required

tags.name: Public Content
tags.description: Public article and page reads — no auth required

tags.name: Public Settings
tags.description: Public site settings subset — no auth required

tags.name: Public Menus
tags.description: Public navigation menus (ACTIVE only) — no auth required

tags.name: Order Lookup
tags.description: Guest order status lookup by order number + key

tags.description: Customer registration, login, session refresh and logout

tags.name: Customer Profile
tags.description: Authenticated customer profile — requires customer session cookie

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Cart checkout and quick-buy — CSRF required

tags.name: Customer Orders
tags.description: Customer's own order history — requires customer session cookie

parameters.name: featured
parameters.description: When true, returns products tagged product_visibility=featured in WordPress.

200.description: Approved reviews for the requested product

201.description: Review submitted and pending moderation. Also returned (with no persistence) when honeypot is filled.

400.description: Validation error (missing/invalid authorName, rating, or comment)

409.description: Duplicate review — same productId + normalized (trim/lowercase/collapsed-whitespace) authorName + comment submitted within the last 24 hours. Rating is not part of the duplicate key, and reviews in any moderation status (PENDING/APPROVED/SPAM/TRASH) are counted.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — 5 submissions per IP per minute

get.description: Returns all SiteSettings where isPublic=true. Includes homepage keys zalo_url, hotline, promo_title, promo_off, promo_href, promo_image_url, seo_home_title, seo_home_description, og_image_url. No authentication required.
Returns the menu at the given location with ACTIVE items only. Returns 404 if menu is INACTIVE.

get.summary: Guest order lookup by number and key

200.description: Login successful. Sets bb_session, bb_refresh, and bb_csrf cookies.

post.summary: Refresh customer session using refresh cookie

get.description: Returns the current guest or authenticated cart. Creates a new guest cart if none exists. Sets bb_guest_id and bb_csrf cookies.

delete.summary: Clear all items and coupons from cart

post.description: Requires X-CSRF-Token header matching bb_csrf cookie value.

get.summary: Get available shipping and payment options

post.description: Creates an order from the current cart. Requires X-CSRF-Token header.

post.summary: Quick buy — single item direct purchase
Admin login — returns JWT access and refresh tokens

patch.description: Sensitive keys (containing secret/password/token/privatekey/private_key/api_key/apikey/accesskey/access_key/client_secret/clientsecret) cannot be set isPublic=true. Updating the value of a sensitive key is allowed as long as isPublic is not set to true.

delete.summary: Delete menu and all its items (physical)

post.summary: Reorder menu items (batch set parentId + sortOrder)
post.description: Validates that no cycles are created and all parentIds belong to the same menu.

get.description: Returns published products matching name or SKU. Requires orders.write permission.

post.description: Creates an order for walk-in customers. Immediately decrements stock. Requires orders.write permission.

parameters.name: featured
parameters.description: Filter by isFeatured flag (true = on homepage 'Sản phẩm nổi bật' grid).

parameters.name: showOnHomepage
parameters.description: Filter by showOnHomepage flag (true = on homepage 'Sản phẩm BigBike' carousel).

200.description: Review list with productId, productName, productSlug, author fields, rating, body, status, and timestamps
Review detail with productId, productName, productSlug, author fields, rating, body, status, and timestamps
Updated review payload with productId, productName, productSlug, author fields, rating, body, status, and timestamps

AdminBearerAuth.description: Admin JWT access token. Obtain via POST /api/v1/auth/login. Header: Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>

CustomerSession.name: bb_session
CustomerSession.description: Customer session cookie. Set automatically after POST /api/v1/customer/auth/login.

CsrfHeader.name: X-CSRF-Token
CsrfHeader.description: CSRF token required for all cart/checkout mutations. Value must match the bb_csrf cookie set by the server.

Conflict.description: Resource conflict (e.g. duplicate email or code)

AdminAnalyticsPeriodSummary.description: Aggregate revenue metrics for the requested date range. All amounts in VND (BigDecimal serialized with scale 2).

grossOrderValue.description: GMV: SUM(totalAmount) excluding CANCELLED and FAILED orders. REFUNDED orders included.

paidRevenue.description: Cash collected: SUM(paidAmount) where paymentStatus IN (PAID, PARTIALLY_PAID, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, REFUNDED), excluding CANCELLED/FAILED orders.

refundAmount.description: Cumulative refunds: SUM(refundAmount) for orders placed in range. Anchored to placedAt, not refundedAt. May not match period refund events — see REPORT_RULE_011.

netRevenue.description: paidRevenue minus refundAmount. May be negative.

orderCount.description: COUNT of orders excluding CANCELLED and FAILED.

avgOrderValue.description: grossOrderValue / orderCount. Zero when orderCount is 0.

date.description: ISO-8601 date YYYY-MM-DD in Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh timezone.

revenue.description: Daily grossOrderValue (same REVENUE_EXCLUDED set as summary).

productKey.description: COALESCE(product_pk, product_id::text). Stable identifier covering both admin-created and regular products.

productName.description: Product name snapshot from order line item.

revenue.description: SUM(lineTotal) excluding RANKING_EXCLUDED order statuses (CANCELLED, FAILED, REFUNDED).

customerKey.description: COALESCE(customer_id::text, customer_email). Stable group key preventing split rows on email change.

orderCount.description: COUNT of orders excluding RANKING_EXCLUDED order statuses.

ApiErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope used by all error responses

website.description: Honeypot field — real clients leave this empty/omitted. Non-empty value (after trim) is silently dropped server-side: response is success-shaped 201 but no review is persisted.

homepageOrder.description: Manual pin priority inside homepage featured/showOnHomepage blocks. Lower = appears earlier; null = unpinned (sorted to the end by createdAt DESC).

rating.description: Denormalized cache of the approved-review average used by product list/detail reads.

ratingCount.description: Denormalized cache of the approved-review count used by product list/detail reads.

productVariantId.description: Variant ID (required if product has variants)

unitPriceOverride.description: Override unit price (must be >= 0 if provided; null = use DB price)

tenderedAmount.description: Cash tendered by customer (VND, must be >= totalAmount if provided)

posIdempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID to prevent duplicate submissions

changeAmount.description: Change to return to customer (CASH only)
